annualCycle.July-August: Prepare your UC application, finalize your coursework plan
annualCycle.September 1-30: Submit TAG application via UC TAP (uctap.universityofcalifornia.edu) — only for TAG-eligible campuses
annualCycle.November 15: TAG decisions released (Davis, Merced, Santa Cruz)
annualCycle.December: UC application closes, begin Transfer Academic Update (TAU)
annualCycle.January 31: Transfer Academic Update (TAU) deadline — report fall grades and spring enrollment
annualCycle.April 30: Review admission decisions and financial aid offers
annualCycle.May 1: Statement of Intent to Register (SIR) deadline — commit to one UC
annualCycle.May-June: Finalize spring coursework, maintain required GPA

tagTimeline.note: TAG is optional — about 2/3 of transfers are admitted without a TAG.
tagTimeline.October 1 - November 30: Submit UC application (must match TAG major exactly)

criticalDeadlines.event: Statement of Intent to Register (SIR) deadline

requirements.minimumUnits: 60 UC-transferable semester units (90 quarter units) by end of spring before transfer
requirements.minimumGPA: 2.4 overall UC-transferable GPA (higher for competitive campuses/majors)
requirements.sevenCoursePattern: Complete English, Math, and 5 additional transferable courses from specific subject areas
requirements.majorPrep: Complete as many major preparation courses as possible — critical for competitive majors
requirements.gradeRequirements: C or better in all transferable courses; no more than 2 D/F grades in major prep
